meaning: adj.尊贵的,高位的,兴奋的,高尚的
examples: My faithful love will be with him, and through my name his horn will be exalted.
I felt exalted and newly alive.
You're moving in very exalted circles!
The first-time CEO possesses an acute intelligence, a top-notch strategic mind, exalted ambition and focus.
Again, the transformational power of the longitudinal arch, which connects the lowly foot to exalted art.
